name: Florida Agency for Health Care Administration
notes: Simple license number search form. Returns status and expiry date.

name: Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation
notes: License verification by license number. Straightforward GET request.

name: Georgia Composite Medical Board
notes: Multi-step navigation. Requires Selenium with explicit waits.

name: Georgia Secretary of State Professional Licensing
notes: Simple lookup by license number and type.

name: Texas Department of State Health Services
notes: Requires navigation through facility type selection before license lookup.

name: Texas Health and Human Services
notes: Google reCAPTCHA v2. Requires human-in-the-loop or captcha solving service.

name: North Carolina Medical Board
notes: API-backed license lookup. POST request returns JSON.

name: Ohio State Medical Board
notes: eLicense portal. Requires selecting license type from dropdown first.

name: Pennsylvania Department of State
notes: Cloudflare challenge on some endpoints. Investigate alternative lookup URL.

name: New York Office of the Professions
notes: License verification search. Note: HTTP (not HTTPS) — verify still active.

name: California Department of Health Care Services
notes: Multi-step form with county selection required before license lookup.

name: Illinois Department of Financial and Professional Regulation
notes: ASP.NET form. Requires posting ViewState. Use requests + BeautifulSoup.

name: New Jersey Division of Consumer Affairs
notes: Standard myLicense portal. Consistent across multiple license types.
